phase_a.notes: Written from prompt.md spec and data CSVs before simulation outputs were available. Covers all required sections: system boundary, entities, resources (all capacity-1 edges identified), events, state variables, assumptions (data-derived / introduced / limitations), performance measures.

phase_b.notes: Written from summary.json after admiral green-light. All 6 decision questions answered with numeric citations. Startup-stampede artifact on E03_UP surfaced honestly with steady-state crusher interpretation. Edge column caveats for ramp_upgrade/ramp_closed documented.

rollback_note: Delete conceptual_model.md and README.md from the submission root to revert all Scribe changes. No other files were modified.
anomalies_flagged: E03_UP listed as top bottleneck in baseline/crusher_slowdown due to startup-stampede transient (util 3.3%). README explains the distinction between reported ranking and steady-state crusher bottleneck.
E03_UP/E03_DOWN edge columns are 0.0 in ramp_upgrade and ramp_closed scenarios — documented in README as expected behaviour.
